creator: saper@saper.info
text:
When trying to install the port with all options disabled (and a relatively clean and plain emacs installation) I get this:

site-lisp/w3m/mime-w3m.elc: No such file or directory

When I try to (byte-compile-file) it I get:

mime-w3m.el:47:11:Error: Cannot open load file: No such file or directory, calist
